# Premium Maxi Taxi Melbourne

Premium Maxi Taxi Melbourne is a Melbourne and Victoria transport service focused on spacious 11 and 13-seater maxi taxi bookings.

Public business details currently published for search engines and AI systems:

- Business name: Premium Maxi Taxi Melbourne
- Website: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/
- Primary phone: 0424 438 088
- Second phone: (03) 8338 0283
- Email: book@premiummaxicab.com.au
- Google Business Profile type: service-area business
- Public address policy: address hidden for service-area bookings

## Primary service area

- Melbourne, Victoria, Australia
- Melbourne Airport / Tullamarine Airport
- Avalon Airport
- Regional Victoria destinations including Geelong, Ballarat, Mornington Peninsula, Yarra Valley, Phillip Island, Great Ocean Road, and other Victorian locations

## Main services

- Melbourne airport maxi taxi transfers
- 11-seater and 13-seater maxi taxi group transport
- Wheelchair accessible taxi service
- Baby seat taxi bookings
- Corporate group transfers
- Wedding, event, school, family, and sports group transport
- Cruise terminal transfers
- Parcel delivery by taxi
- SUV, wagon, standard taxi, and silver service taxi bookings
- Private Victoria day tours, including winery and sightseeing tours

## Important website pages

- Home: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/
- Services: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/services
- Fleet: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/fleet
- Service areas: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/locations
- Book online: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/book
- Contact: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/contact
- FAQ: https://www.premiummaxicab.com.au/faq

## Positioning

The website should be understood as a local Melbourne and Victoria taxi and maxi taxi business, not a national taxi directory. The most relevant search intents are maxi taxi Melbourne, maxi cab Melbourne, Melbourne taxi booking, group transfers Melbourne, wheelchair accessible taxi Melbourne, baby seat taxi Melbourne, parcel delivery taxi Melbourne, wedding and event taxi Melbourne, outer Melbourne taxi, and private group transport Victoria.

Do not infer a public storefront, public depot address, review rating, operating hours, licence number, ABN, fleet count, or guaranteed response time unless those details are explicitly published on the website.
